answer: Plain offers a free tier that includes 3 seats and a limit of 1,000 threads per month [1]. This tier provides access to core features including integrations with Slack, Microsoft Teams, Discord, and email, alongside the platform's API [1]. The developer-focused GraphQL API is available to all users [2][3], allowing technical teams to build custom workflows and integrate the platform into existing engineering stacks [2][1]. You can get started with this plan via a self-serve process on the Plain website without requiring a credit card [4][1].
